programme.title: Scared and Snared Down Under-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Laura finds a shocking animal nest as camps race to build spring snare traps. S03 E03.

programme.title: All Shelter Breaks Loose-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Competitors scramble in a dome shelter challenge where Laura suffers whiplash. S03 E04.

programme.title: Savage Strategies-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Matt's tactics spark tension and survivalists craft primitive axes. S03 E05.

programme.title: Lake Whitefish & Wild Salad-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S01 E04.

programme.title: Sahara-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls faces extreme challenges as he consumes deadly scorpions to survive in the Sahara. S02 E01.

programme.title: Frankendozer-Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker cannibalises multiple machines to construct a Frankendozer. S14 E11.

programme.title: With David Walliams-Bear's Mission
programme.desc: David Walliams and Bear Grylls test their survival skills in Devon's rugged valleys. S01 E05.

programme.title: La Joya-Dual Survival Colombia
programme.desc: Survivalists Daniel Tirado and Alberto Pegueros use survival skills in the Aztec lands. S02 E01.

programme.title: African Savannah-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah. S01 E07.

programme.title: Texas Hog and Beautyberry-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E02.

programme.title: Cicadas & Mulberries-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E01.

programme.title: Inner Mongolia-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed participates in the annual rite of passage festival in order to prove his masculinity. S01 E04.

programme.title: Ecuador-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed travels to the heart of the Ecuadorian rainforest to live with the Waorani. S01 E05.

programme.title: Uncharted Amazon with Ash Dykes
programme.desc: Ash Dykes and his team go on a daring expedition through the untamed jungles of Suriname. S01 E02.

programme.title: Dual Survival Brazil
programme.desc: Professional survivalists attempt to conquer the dangerous wilderness of South America.

programme.title: Fan Vs Wild-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear takes two fans into the Canadian wilderness for their ultimate survival challenge. S05 E05.

programme.title: Extreme Desert-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls embarks on an adventure to the Mojave Desert and conquers the sandstorm in scoring heat. S05 E06.

programme.title: Snow Daze-Dual Survival
programme.desc: Joe Teti and Matt Graham try to survive in the world's most hostile environments. S08 E06.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo
programme.desc: Chinese actor and singer Wang Yibo undertakes outdoor adventures in extreme environments.

programme.title: Sahara-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls faces extreme challenges as he consumes deadly scorpions to survive in the Sahara. S02 E01.

programme.title: Untouched Atolls-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The host gives a lesson on how to fish reefs and attempts to swim with sailfish. S02 E04.

programme.title: Heartbreak Tuna: Capetown-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S02 E05.

programme.title: New Zealand: South Island-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear visits the remote parts of New Zealand and struggles with unpredictable conditions. S07 E02.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: When Dawid departs from Kochi, he heads to Goa for his next assignment.

programme.title: Down Under Siege-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Pushed to the brink, three competitors send shockwaves through the Outback. S03 E06.

programme.title: Bringing the Heat and the Meat-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: A dark horse wins a key asset and a big kill could shift the power balance. S03 E07.
